name: Eric Bolling
subject: It's disgusting
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ Stop the fake news and support President Trump | [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzQ0LTM4YjkwMTQ5MTFlZTRkOGQ4YTBmNDhlYzgxNDNiZTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhemV0dm9ubGluZS5jb20vdHJ1bXAtcG9sbC1nb3AzLw&K=x3x-_qD-rHuAD17hJtj8-A)
---
Fellow Conservative, CNN and MSNBC keep putting out these fake approval polls of President Trump to make him look TERRIBLE. It’s honestly disgusting. The media would rather see our country fail than let President Trump succeed. I need your help showing them that their nonstop negative coverage isn't working. **For one of my next shows on BlazeTV, I’ll be airing the results of an early 2020 election poll -- and I’d love for you to participate.** **[Will you vote for President Trump in 2020?](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzQ0LTM4YjkwMTQ5MTFlZTRkOGQ4YTBmNDhlYzgxNDNiZTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhemV0dm9ubGluZS5jb20vdHJ1bXAtcG9sbC1nb3AzLw&K=KQeSLwcR5kNlkMOOpetmeg)** **[Yes!](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzQ0LTM4YjkwMTQ5MTFlZTRkOGQ4YTBmNDhlYzgxNDNiZTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhemV0dm9ubGluZS5jb20vdHJ1bXAtcG9sbC1nb3AzLw&K=tV4k-IlJ_UN096UF7ZEZKw)** **[No!](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzQ0LTM4YjkwMTQ5MTFlZTRkOGQ4YTBmNDhlYzgxNDNiZTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhemV0dm9ubGluZS5jb20vdHJ1bXAtcG9sbC1nb3AzLw&K=oQG-Fuuv-CndN6hsBcTEaA)** _NOTE: Even if you vote multiple times, your vote will only count in our poll ONCE._ **[Please take our 2020 election poll to let the media know if you’re planning on voting for President Donald J. Trump DESPITE their nonstop, negative coverage.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzQ0LTM4YjkwMTQ5MTFlZTRkOGQ4YTBmNDhlYzgxNDNiZTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhemV0dm9ubGluZS5jb20vdHJ1bXAtcG9sbC1nb3AzLw&K=L4UrAQYrN0kTYzZGYQ3WJw)** Thank you, [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzQ0LTM4YjkwMTQ5MTFlZTRkOGQ4YTBmNDhlYzgxNDNiZTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhemV0dm9ubGluZS5jb20vdHJ1bXAtcG9sbC1nb3AzLw&K=3kZoWRenDmCEN3p-wM3xSw) Eric Bolling

name: Lipinski Infrastructure Team
subject: Peter, can you help us launch this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible
body:
| Hi Peter, we’re bumping this message from Dan to the top of your inbox. **_[Our Infrastructure Campaign needs just 44 more donors to launch successfully. Can we count you in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3609748/26383132/74905028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdlNDhhNi1hM2ZjLWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHnEjGogii5q9Eg9KyIUIIMhlD2FQBTOBxwAtPDmdwc=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181210_1_2&amount=10&recurring=auto)_**

It’s time to fix our state’s crumbling infrastructure, and Dan is committed to leading the charge. Please read on below, and then **_[click here to support our efforts now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3609749/26383133/74905028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdlNDhhNi1hM2ZjLWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHnEjGogii5q9Eg9KyIUIIMhlD2FQBTOBxwAtPDmdwc=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181210_1_2&amount=10&recurring=auto)_**

**Begin forwarded message:**
> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3609750/26383134/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdlNDhhNi1hM2ZjLWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHnEjGogii5q9Eg9KyIUIIMhlD2FQBTOBxwAtPDmdwc=)
> Peter,
>
> As the most senior member from Illinois on the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I have brought over $375 million in federal funding to Illinois’ roads, bridges, and transportation projects. This is an issue I care deeply about, and one that is highly important to Illinois residents.
>
> **Today I’m rolling up my sleeves to do even more to fix our nation’s infrastructure._[If you’re with us, please click here to help us launch our Infrastructure Campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3609751/26383135/74905028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdlNDhhNi1hM2ZjLWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHnEjGogii5q9Eg9KyIUIIMhlD2FQBTOBxwAtPDmdwc=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181210_1_2&amount=10&recurring=auto)_**
>
> I was recently named the co-chair of Governor-Elect J.B. Pritzker’s Restoring Illinois’ Infrastructure Committee, and I am proud to be able to work with a dedicated team to find commonsense solutions to repair our crumbling infrastructure.
>
> This should be top priority. A recent report found that over a third of Illinois’ roads are in poor or mediocre condition. Thanks to headache-inducing congestion and our deteriorating roads and bridges, drivers in Illinois alone lose an estimated $16.4 billion annually. It’s time to tackle this problem head-on.
>
> **_[That’s why my team is launching our Infrastructure Campaign, but we need 100 grassroots donors to step up and help out. Can you chip in $10 now to start us off?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3609752/26383136/74905028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdlNDhhNi1hM2ZjLWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHnEjGogii5q9Eg9KyIUIIMhlD2FQBTOBxwAtPDmdwc=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181210_1_2&amount=10&recurring=auto)_**
>
> We need to move ahead on this at both the federal and state levels to fix our crumbling infrastructure, improve our quality of life and put people to work.
>
> I'm pleased to have a seat at the table for both efforts, and I’m asking you to help us lay out the groundwork for huge infrastructure improvements starting right now.
>
> **_[If you’re ready for better roads and bridges, click here to help us launch our Infrastructure Campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3609753/26383137/74905028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdlNDhhNi1hM2ZjLWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHnEjGogii5q9Eg9KyIUIIMhlD2FQBTOBxwAtPDmdwc=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181210_1_2&amount=10&recurring=auto)_**
>
> Thanks,
>
> Dan

| |
---

[Unsubscribe Now](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d07e48a6-a3fc-e811-9f2a-2818784f9b65/d17e48a6-a3fc-e811-9f2a-2818784f9b65?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdlNDhhNi1hM2ZjLWU4MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4Nzg0ZjliNjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHnEjGogii5q9Eg9KyIUIIMhlD2FQBTOBxwAtPDmdwc=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs, IL 60558
United States

clean_body: | Hi Peter, we’re bumping this message from Dan to the top of your inbox. It’s time to fix our state’s crumbling infrastructure, and Dan is committed to leading the charge. Please read on below, and then Begin forwarded message: = Peter, As the most senior member from Illinois on the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I have brought over $375 million in federal funding to Illinois’ roads, bridges, and transportation projects. This is an issue I care deeply about, and one that is highly important to Illinois residents. Today I’m rolling up my sleeves to do even more to fix our nation’s infrastructure. I was recently named the co-chair of Governor-Elect J.B. Pritzker’s Restoring Illinois’ Infrastructure Committee, and I am proud to be able to work with a dedicated team to find commonsense solutions to repair our crumbling infrastructure. This should be top priority. A recent report found that over a third of Illinois’ roads are in poor or mediocre condition. Thanks to headache-inducing congestion and our deteriorating roads and bridges, drivers in Illinois alone lose an estimated $16.4 billion annually. It’s time to tackle this problem head-on. We need to move ahead on this at both the federal and state levels to fix our crumbling infrastructure, improve our quality of life and put people to work. I'm pleased to have a seat at the table for both efforts, and I’m asking you to help us lay out the groundwork for huge infrastructure improvements starting right now. Thanks, Dan | | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. Dan Lipinski for Congress P.O. Box 520 Western Springs, IL 60558 United States

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Sign this climate change petition >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Despite a report released by his own administration that confirms what we already know -- that climate change is real, and it's one of the most dangerous threats we'll face in our lifetime -- President Trump still says that he doesn't believe it.
Let me be clear: **Science is real, climate change is real, and these reports are very real. If we don't take bold action now, our planet and our wellbeing will be irreversibly damaged. **
I'm doing everything I can to protect our planet, but I need to know that you're with me.
[**Please sign my petition calling on President Trump to take meaningful action on climate change right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc116/2a380d31/34256e30/f174c3/804427812/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DGA-climatereport/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fclimate-report%26refcode%3D2018_climatereport_up")
The truth is that the intensifying natural disasters we've witnessed -- like hurricanes, wildfires and droughts -- will only get more catastrophic and occur more frequently, and the environmental changes could shrink the economy by almost 10 percent.
Climate change is here, everyone, and we're running out of time to reverse it. Experts say that our window to stem the damage is closing.
We can't afford to sit idly by, and one thing you can do right now is to put your name down to say that you're all in to protect our future. [**Will you please click here sign the petition?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc116/2a380d31/34256e30/f174c3/804427812/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DGA-climatereport/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fclimate-report%26refcode%3D2018_climatereport_up")
Thank you for getting involved.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc116/2a380d31/34256e30/f174cc/804427812/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTIxMF9DbGltYXRlSkFfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20181210_ClimateJA_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc116/2a380d31/34256e30/f174cd/804427812/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

Let me be clear: Science is real, climate change is real, and these reports are very real. If we don't take bold action now, our planet and our wellbeing will be irreversibly damaged. I'm doing everything I can to protect our planet, but I need to know that you're with me. name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Demand climate action now
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Last month, 300 climate scientists and 13 federal agencies -- agencies in Trump's own administration -- published a report on climate change. Here are just a few of their disturbing conclusions: "Impacts from climate change on extreme weather and climate-related events, air quality, and the transmission of disease through insects and pests, food, and water **increasingly threaten the health and well-being of the American people [...]"** "Without significant reductions in global greenhouse gas emissions and regional adaptation measures, **many coastal regions will be transformed by the latter part of this century [...]"** "With continued growth in emissions at historic rates, **annual losses in some economic sectors are projected to reach hundreds of billions of dollars by the end of the century --** more than the current gross domestic product (GDP) of many U.S. states." The report points out that current efforts to combat climate change "do not yet approach the scale considered necessary to avoid substantial damages" to our country. Trump's response? **"I don't believe it."** Well, believe it or not Mr. President, this is happening. It's science, fact-based and a huge threat. And we need to take action. [**Today, we 're working to get 100,000 activists to sign our petition to demand climate action. Add your name to join us >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cca/622b7b5b/1e5cd75e/307b7d80/3907310262/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DGA-climatereport/?code=Schultz&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse181210ja%3Frecurring%3Dtrue") Florida is at considerable risk from climate change. The City of Miami Beach already plans to spend between $400-$500 million over the next five years to address rising sea levels. We are second in the country in coastline length and we're home to delicate, unique ecosystems like the Everglades -- making our state particularly vulnerable. The President of the United States is supposed to protect our families and our country from all threats. This threat is imminent -- and the president chooses to stick his head in the sand and hope the water doesn't rise around his ears. The time for ignorance is over. [**Join me in demanding climate action.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cca/622b7b5b/1e5cd75e/307b7d80/3907310262/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DGA-climatereport/?code=Schultz&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse181210ja%3Frecurring%3Dtrue") Thanks for stepping up today. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cca/622b7b5b/1e5cd75e/307b7d83/3907310262/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Lara Trump
subject: Will you renew?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The President wants to know. |
---
| | | | | | |
Friend,

Since our journey first began on June 16, 2015, we've never forgotten our members.

You are the ones who are truly making America great again.

Now we're getting ready to embark on the second chapter of the world's greatest political movement in history -- and the President and I are urgently asking you to renew your membership for 2019 early.
---

And this time we need to start even earlier. The swamp has been seeking their revenge since we ruined their plan to install Hillary Clinton as President of the United States.

_Because this early membership renewal is such an important request, I 've asked Lara to show me the names of all the patriots who went above and beyond._

I want you to know that your support does not go unnoticed.

We appreciate everything you've done for our movement. Together, we are making America great again.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Trump Boom Is No Mere ‘Sugar High’
body:
"Liberals are tripping over themselves to explain why the economy has performed so much better under Donald Trump than it did under Barack Obama..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e71548d5cd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Signs Hatch-Sponsored Child Pornography Victim Assistance Law**

“Child pornography victims could have better access to federal restitution under a bipartisan bill President Donald Trump signed into law Friday. Sen. Orrin Hatch, R-Utah, a key sponsor of the Amy, Vicky, and Andy Child Pornography Victim Assistance Act, called the signing a ‘momentous’ day that was many years in the making,” Dennis Romboy writes in _Deseret News_.

“This bipartisan legislation will provide meaningful assistance for child pornography victims to support their recovery and allow them to reclaim their lives,” Senator Hatch said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f59a27ea93&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Liberals are tripping over themselves to explain why the economy has performed so much better under Donald Trump than it did under Barack Obama,” Stephen Moore writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=69dd4fb3cd&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The economy has grown by nearly 4% over the past six months, and the final number for 2018 is expected to come in at between 3% and 3.5%. The U.S. growth rate has doubled since Mr. Obama’s last year in office.” The bottom line: President Trump’s tax cuts have primed this economy for “long-term growth, not a short-term buzz.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump attended the annual Army-Navy football game Saturday and officiated the pre-match coin toss on the field flanked by top military officials,” John Bowden writes in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=394f31d0e3&e=3ee4985eea)_. The President was joined on-field "by top members of the military including Defense Secretary James Mattis, who watched as a smiling Trump tossed the coin following a moment of silence for former President George H.W. Bush. The annual football game between the Naval Academy in Annapolis and the Military Academy at West Point is a major tradition dating back to 1890 that has been attended by multiple former presidents.”

[Watch: President Trump attends this year’s Army-Navy game](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=279749590f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump recently made an excellent move to promote the education of children in developing countries. His administration freed resources already appropriated within the United States Agency for International Development (USAID) to be given to privately run schools,” Ken Blackwell writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acddb58332&e=3ee4985eea). “This will allow for a higher population of genuinely underprivileged kids to gain an education despite their circumstances and safeguard the educational systems for the world’s most vulnerable people.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=83c8fff538&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5e8c51de4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=02e8b4d6a4)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: Use the Internet? This will affect you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | **If the House doesn't take action today, the FCC will repeal net neutrality protections.** [**ADD YOUR NAME TO HELP SAVE THE FREE AND OPEN INTERNET**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ccb/622b7b5b/1e5509f6/307b7d0f/2106344923/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181212b") This issue matters to anyone who accesses the Internet. House Democrats are ready for action. House Republicans are not. [**Let Speaker Ryan and House Republicans know you support net neutrality and want action today. Add your name and then share on social media to help amplify opposition >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ccb/622b7b5b/1e5509f6/307b7d0f/2106344923/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181212b") The Internet is a place where anyone can go -- whether you're a cook or a Congresswoman, a small business owner or a Fortune 500 CEO -- to showcase their ideas, innovation, and creativity. There's no telling what will happen if net neutrality evaporates and we hand a staggering level of control to huge Internet Service Providers whose bottom line is, well, their bottom line. [**Urge House Republicans to act before it's too late >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ccb/622b7b5b/1e5509f6/307b7d0f/2106344923/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181212b") Thank you. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ccb/622b7b5b/1e5509f6/307b7d0e/2106344923/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Governor Holcomb
subject: our 2019 agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Empty template Last week, I announced our 2019 Next Level Agenda, a big plan
for expanding opportunity for all Hoosiers across our state.

<>

Friend,

Last week, I announced our 2019 Next Level Agenda, a big plan for expanding
opportunity for all Hoosiers across our state.

With job creation booming and more Hoosiers working than ever before, more
folks around the world are recognizing Indiana as a top place to live, work,
play, and stay. Simply put, Indiana is the envy of the nation.

But as Hoosiers, we’ve never been ones to rest on our laurels. And we won’t
stop until Indiana’s success story includes every single Hoosier who wants to
be a part of it.

With that in mind, our 2019 Next Level Agenda was crafted with our five
governing pillars - the pillars that are taking Indiana to the Next Level:

* We will continue growing our economy by passing Indiana’s eighth-straight
balanced budget and modernizing economic development tools to increase
competitiveness, economic diversity and flexibility.

* Infrastructure is linking Hoosiers to each other and the world. Our plan
will see I-69 completed by 2024 (three years early!), as well as expand
high-speed broadband to unserved communities, making it available to even more
Hoosiers.

* We will stand with Hoosiers at every step of their education, and ensure
that Indiana schools have the flexibility to develop partnerships to expose
students to career opportunities earlier in their education.

* To promote public health, we will fight harder than ever to beat the drug
epidemic and lower infant mortality. We will also adopt school safety
recommendations, including more mental health tools and physical safety
enhancements.

* Hoosiers deserve great government service, and that begins with upgrades in
technology systems across state government.

These five pillars will serve as the foundation of our 2019 Next Level Agenda,
just as they have since we first took office. I could not be more excited to
fulfill this vision and help lift up Hoosiers across the state with increased
opportunity and access to 21st century skills.

I’m so excited to see what’s next for Indiana. I hope you'll join me in our
efforts to take Indiana to the world, and bring the world to Indiana.

Thanks,

Governor Eric Holcomb

Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000
annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs & political committees are not
limited.
Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited.

Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 1180, Indianapolis, IN
46204 | (317) 569-0709

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

<http://links.holcombforindiana.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_s=a5d9e4e27ee04b6f8f158d962c99a988&_t=LTWVk_hkBQMLlCppTGGKCCoCnyKsE_2r4-Pb3VxvX0qd0-ZtUhF79CwWI6GCu1ahhoUS49uHXiirOPJ1rO4NtWreEn-DHGQG0hi16dhxyEJUwkVJEMtghqJgZ8m0UAphnEJ3OQYI3eXRstqqvkFyWnQ4nCMAXOgBML4Kh3x6Awo%3D>
